lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in fair condition. It has noticeable wear on both the interior and exterior. It is currently operational but will require some mechanical repairs and maintenance in the near future.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and in perfect condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and body work to be roadworthy. The exterior shows extensive rust, large dents, and faded paint, while the interior has worn upholstery and missing trim pieces. It currently has major engine issues and will likely need to be towed. Ideal as a parts car or a serious project for a dedicated mechanic.

Get ready for a dependable daily driver that's ready for its next adventure! This car has been a reliable companion and still offers a solid performance on the road. While it shows some honest signs of use and character—such as some cosmetic imperfections and standard wear consistent with its age—it remains a practical and functional choice for anyone looking for a reliable vehicle at a great value. It’s a hardworking car that’s ready to get you where you need to go!
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and is a solid choice for someone looking for a dependable daily driver without a premium price tag. The exterior has seen better days, with some noticeable clear coat peeling on the roof and a few door dings from parking lots. Inside, the upholstery shows moderate wear, particularly on the driver's seat bolster, and the air conditioning takes a few minutes to get cold. Mechanically, the car starts every time and shifts smoothly, though it will likely need new brake pads within the next 5,000 miles. It’s a functional, honest car that reflects its age and mileage, perfect for a commute or a first car.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects meticulous care and uncompromising standards. For the discerning buyer seeking an unparalleled driving experience without compromise, this represents a premier acquisition opportunity. Available for immediate inspection.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this beauty—it’s honestly in such incredible shape, you’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for that 'new car' feel without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of the S54 naturally aspirated inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. Every mechanical aspect is optimized, from the Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to the variable M differential lock ensuring maximum power delivery to the
Used car. Mint condition. Spotless interior and exterior. Mechanically perfect. Single owner. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. The exterior is finished in a flawless coat that retains its deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirl marks, stone chips, or surface imperfections. Inside, the cabin is an immaculate sanctuary; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and uncreased, while every trim piece, button, and digital interface looks and functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a whisper-quiet engine and a precision-tuned suspension that delivers a factory-new driving experience. It comes with a comprehensive, fully documented service history, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage and maintained with an open checkbook. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle in absolute peak condition, this is an unrivaled opportunity to own a perfect example of automotive excellence.

Presented in peerless condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, the automobile offers a showroom-fresh aesthetic coupled with mechanical perfection. We invite the most discerning collectors to inspect this exemplary specimen, which stands as a testament to rigorous maintenance and care.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive preservation, this vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior finish retains its original luster, while the interior remains devoid of any discernible wear. Mechanically, the vehicle has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising standards for performance and reliability. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that reflects the highest tier of care and aesthetic integrity.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered its whole life and is looking for a new home. You won't find one cleaner than this. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This FD3S RX-7 represents a pinnacle of 90s JDM engineering, maintained to an exacting standard. The 13B-REW power plant features a factory-spec sequential twin-turbocharger setup, delivering a linear torque curve and crisp throttle response. Compression across all rotor faces remains within factory tolerances, ensuring the integrity of the apex seals. The chassis retains its structural rigidity, complemented by a pristine double-wishbone suspension geometry and a Torsen limited-slip differential. Every vacuum line, bushing, and synchromesh performs with showroom precision. This is a collector-grade example with zero undercarriage oxidation, offering
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This car is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior boasts a flawless, deep-gloss finish with absolutely zero chips, swirls, or imperfections, complemented by factory-fresh alloy wheels wrapped in premium rubber. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the high-grade leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma. Every technological feature, from the immersive sound system to the advanced driver-assist suite, functions with precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documented at authorized dealerships. It drives as smoothly and powerfully as the day it rolled off the assembly line. For the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality, this is an unrivaled opportunity to own a masterpiece of automotive engineering.

Presenting an automotive specimen of peerless quality. This vehicle has been curated to an exacting standard, maintaining an impeccable aesthetic and mechanical profile that mirrors its original delivery state. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of excellence, this offering represents a definitive benchmark in its class.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, exhibiting a condition that rivals its original showroom delivery. Every detail, from the pristine exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a history of fastidious care. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle in truly superlative, collector-grade condition.

Hey there! I’m so excited to show you this absolute gem. This car is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered and kept in the garage, so it's practically spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new and ready for the road, this is the one for you. Come say hi and take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This superlative example of the E92 chassis features the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power through eight individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. The vehicle remains in concours-level condition, with a pristine undercarriage and zero signs of oil seepage or subframe fatigue. Proactive maintenance includes a documented rod bearing service using VAC coated bearings and ARP bolts, ensuring mechanical longevity. The Electronic Damper Control (EDC) provides sharp handling characteristics, while the M-Variable Differential Lock ensures optimal torque distribution across the rear axle. The paint exhibits exceptional depth with no discernible swirl marks, and the interior retains its original factory matte finish on all Alcantara and leather surfaces. A meticulously maintained specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Original interior. No mechanical issues. Garage kept. Title in hand.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade specimen in breathtaking showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, dings, or scratches, paired with alloy wheels that show no signs of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery looks and feels untouched, retaining its original factory scent, while every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained with a complete, documented service history. This car drives with the same precision and smoothness as the day it rolled off the assembly line. It is, quite simply, the finest example of this model you will find on the market.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, having been maintained to the highest standards of mechanical and aesthetic excellence. It offers a peerless driving experience for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom condition. Every detail reflects a commitment to automotive excellence, offering the discerning driver a rare opportunity to acquire a machine of singular quality and performance. This represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved with uncompromising care and presented in pristine order.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot. I've babied it since day one, kept it garage-stored, and followed every maintenance check to a T. It’s a total dream to drive and honestly feels brand new. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. This specimen is mechanically flawless, with a documented VANOS overhaul and rod bearing service already completed. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission shifts with bolt-action precision, paired with a perfectly calibrated limited-slip differential. The chassis is structurally sound with reinforced subframe points, providing the communicative feedback and torsional rigidity expected of a concours-level performance machine. Original factory paint and a pristine interior make this a definitive collector's example.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Full service records included. Runs perfectly. Original paint, no scratches.

This exceptional vehicle is in true showroom condition, meticulously maintained by its sole owner and always stored in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior boasts a flawless factory finish with zero chips or swirls, while the interior retains that new-car aroma, featuring pristine leather and fully functional, top-tier technology. Mechanically, it is perfect, backed by a comprehensive service history from the original dealership. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives as though it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous stewardship and an uncompromising commitment to maintenance throughout its history. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, underscores its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning driver. We invite you to experience a standard of excellence that is increasingly rare in the pre-owned market.
